TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tabilas ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 115 buwan, 361 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 292 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 69 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 1%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tabilas hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tabilas hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tabilas hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tabilas hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tabilas hya' ga Quwis awi'. tay 'llaw na Tabilas hya' ga Swasiq. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 4 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taβilas~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa quwis~ɕ awiʔ. taj ʔllaw na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕwas~ɕiq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tabilas ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 115 buwan, 361 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 292 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 69 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 1%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tabilas hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tabilas hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tabilas hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tabilas hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tabilas hya' ga Quwis awi'. tay 'llaw na Tabilas hya' ga Swasiq. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 4 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taβilas~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa quwis~ɕ awiʔ. taj ʔllaw na taβilas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕwas~ɕiq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
